business_ideas.idea: IP licensing from movies/TV brands for restaurants (like Bubba Gump Shrimp)
Dunder Mifflin Paper Company brand licensed from The Office
Duff Beer from The Simpsons as actual beer product
Wonka Bar chocolates and candies using Willy Wonka brand
Mad Men/Sterling Cooper ad agency brand for advertising firms
Nostalgia licensing company buying options on '90s brands and reselling to manufacturers
Business-in-a-box model for snow cones, ice cream trucks, pest control
Multi-brand franchise model like 1-800-Got-Junk combining multiple services
Service provider dispatch with lead generation and local fulfillment
Airbnb photography service for property listings
MicroAcquire marketplace for buying and selling startups (Zillow for M&A)
Micro SPAC model for startup capital raising from retail investors

predictions.text: Rich people giving money to space exploration will pave way for future space value capture
Niche SaaS and e-commerce will replace traditional small businesses like restaurants and plumbing
Majority of non-unicorn startups (97.5%) will find home on MicroAcquire-like platforms
